doctorPreference.title: Doctor Preference Injection
doctorPreference.detail: Verify occlusion with articulating paper before reducing the distal wall, then confirm clearance before margin refinement.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Initial Occlusal Reduction
steps.detail: Maintain water spray and keep reduction depth uniform across the occlusal table before moving to cusp refinement.
steps.operatorCue: Stay centered on the occlusal table and keep the field dry enough for visibility.
steps.verification: Reduction grooves read even and depth is clinically consistent.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Next Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: High-speed handpiece staged in tray zone B2 with water spray checked.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Proximal Break Contact
steps.detail: Open interproximal contact cleanly while preserving adjacent tooth surfaces and maintaining bur control.
steps.operatorCue: Doctor preference applies here: verify distal wall clearance before committing to the break.
steps.verification: Contact opens without dragging and clearance is visible from the assistant side.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Next Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: Margin refinement bur and air-water ready in rear slab lane C1.
predictedHandoff.trigger: Advance after proximal walls are opened.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Axial Wall + Margin Refinement
steps.detail: Refine axial walls and smooth the margin while maintaining taper and visibility for the final impression path.
steps.operatorCue: Keep the retraction lane open and cord reserve visible before margin pass.
steps.verification: Margin is continuous, smooth, and visible without soft tissue collapse.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Next Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: Cord #00 plus hemostatic staged in zone C1 for immediate pass.
predictedHandoff.trigger: Release once final margin sweep is clean.

steps.label: Step 04
steps.title: Cord Placement + Final Scan
steps.detail: Place cord, verify tissue control, and hand off to final scan or impression capture without breaking flow.
steps.operatorCue: Keep scan wand lane sterile and provisional material reserve visible.
steps.verification: Field is dry, tissue is controlled, and capture path is ready.

predictedHandoff.label: Predicted Next Handoff
predictedHandoff.supportingItem: Impression fallback remains blocked until material is restaged.
predictedHandoff.trigger: Advance after cord placement and isolation check.
